response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform development; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute architecture or distributed systems leadership, and no demonstrable technical leadership in mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Active open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
Proven experience building scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective, real-time microservices)
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years of C++ programming as required
Lacks demonstrated experience with cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers
